arts.sum: Liverpool’s great start to the Premier League campaign continued as they ran out 2-1 winners over Chelsea on Sunday. Arne Slot’s Reds moved back to...

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'prepare offer' for £83m star as fresh club stance emerges amid '€60m release clause'
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool transfer news and gossip with updates on Borussia Dortmund forward Jamie Bynoe-Gittens and Sevilla defender Loic Bade

arts.ttl: Liverpool sign teenage talent to first professional contract ahead of goalkeeping shake-up
arts.sum: Liverpool have signed teenage goalkeeper Kornel Misciur to his first professional contract, handing him the opportunity to prove himself worthy of a future first-team place. It has brought uncertainty to the 32-year-old Brazilian's long-term place at the club, especially with a degree of future-proofing already carried out in the form of a pre-arranged £29m transfer for Valencia and Georgia goalkeeper Giorgi Mamardashvili.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah truth hiding in plain sight all along as Liverpool get contract message
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is only becoming more important to the way Liverpool play as the wait for his new deal goes on

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate makes most of Arne Slot change as Liverpool star returns to Leipzig
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate has become arguably Liverpool's best defender this season and the France international, who visits former club Leipzig in the Champions League tonight, is also beginning to make an impact going forward

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Mo Salah antics called out as Arne Slot offers Diogo Jota update
arts.sum: Liverpool star Mohamed Salah has been called out for attempting to win a penalty on Sunday as Arne Slot remains unclear as to how serious Diogo Jota's injury is

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits Pep Guardiola theory is 'true' as Liverpool boss sends clear Man City message
arts.sum: Arne Slot talks taking on Pep Guardiola's Manchester City and what Jurgen Klopp's Anfield message meant to him

arts.ttl: Ex-Liverpool star makes major Mohamed Salah contract claim he won't want to hear
arts.sum: Liverpool have decisions to make on Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold, with all three players out of contract at the end of the current season

arts.ttl: Pep Lijnders reveals the truth about Jurgen Klopp's Liverpool exit, the 'bronzed' pictures his old boss sends him and his son's jibes about Salzburg switch
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW BY LEWIS STEELE: Described by some as the brains of the Jurgen Klopp operation, the German's former right-hand man Pepijn Lijnders is a good talker.
